MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC'S Motion To File Confidential Records Under Seal In Support Of Its Motion For Summary Adjudication.

Defendant's motion to seal is granted. Defendant demonstrates good cause to seal Ex. E (Exhibits 9, 10) to the Madden Decl. [confidential investigation notes]. Defendant shall prepare an order that recites the findings of CRC 2.550(d).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and recites the findings of CRC 2.5550(d) and must comply with CRC 3.1312.
